game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair:** Players progress through a story-driven murder mystery, alternating between investigation and class trial phases across a tropical island setting. During investigations, players navigate 3D environments using virtual joystick or tap-to-move controls, tapping on objects and characters to gather 5-10 pieces of evidence and testimony per chapter. Class trials involve presenting collected evidence to "shoot down" contradictory statements from other characters, often through minigames where players must tap or swipe to select the correct evidence within a 5-10 second time limit per statement. Successful completion of a trial advances the narrative to the next chapter, while failing to identify the killer or making too many incorrect deductions (e.g., 3 incorrect choices) results in a game over, requiring a retry from a checkpoint. Progression unlocks new story segments and adds content to the Intimacy, Character, and Ultimate Galleries, with minigame difficulty scaling dynamically based on player performance or chapter progression. The UI features optimized touch controls for 3D map movement and a "map jumping" function for instant travel between 5-8 key locations within an area.
game_info.description: Solve a tropical island murder mystery by investigating crime scenes and presenting evidence in intense class trials. Navigate between locations, collect evidence by examining objects, and then use your findings to counter false statements during trials. Successfully identify the killer to advance through chapters, but beware—three wrong accusations end the game!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through locations and menus
Space: Examine objects/interact during investigation; Select evidence during trials
Z: Confirm selection; Shoot evidence at statements during trials
Shift: Quick travel between key locations (when available)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic navigation and interaction mechanics. Validates that the player can move between locations, examine objects to collect evidence, and interact with the game environment properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Systematically navigate through all available locations using arrow keys. Examine every interactive object using Space to collect evidence pieces. Verify that evidence is properly added to inventory.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate all locations and collect at least 3 pieces of evidence. Inventory system properly tracks collected evidence. No errors occur during navigation or interaction.

TEST_1.strategy: Systematically navigate through all available locations using arrow keys. Examine every interactive object using Space to collect evidence pieces. Verify that evidence is properly added to inventory.
TEST_1.expected: Successfully navigate all locations and collect at least 3 pieces of evidence. Inventory system properly tracks collected evidence. No errors occur during navigation or interaction.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win path through investigation and trial phases. Validates that optimal evidence selection during trials leads to successfully identifying the killer and winning the game.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Complete investigation phase by collecting all critical evidence. During trial phase, select the correct evidence to counter each false statement. Use optimal strategy to avoid wrong accusations and complete the trial successfully.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Complete both investigation and trial phases without exceeding the mistake limit. Successfully identify the killer and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. All game mechanics function correctly throughout the playthrough.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests the lose condition by deliberately making wrong accusations during the trial phase. Validates that the mistake counter works correctly and triggers game over appropriately.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Complete investigation phase normally to collect evidence. During trial phase, intentionally select wrong evidence when countering statements to accumulate mistakes until reaching the limit.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Mistake counter increments correctly with each wrong choice. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state after 3 mistakes. Proper lose screen is displayed with restart option.
